list.vod_blurb: Ava Cooper is caught in a web of love, betrayal, and hidden secrets as a dangerous affair forces her
list.vod_content: Ava Cooper is caught in a web of love, betrayal, and hidden secrets as a dangerous affair forces her to question everyone around her.

list.vod_content: After losing his wife, the deranged and reclusive Dr. Henry Jekyll descends into a nightmare of grief and obsession - until he takes Sharcopine, an untested drug that warps his body into a bloodthirsty man-shark. Now driven by madness and love beyond the

list.vod_blurb: Piotr is a lawyer who, through a twist of fate, becomes the head of a crime gang previously run by h
list.vod_content: Piotr is a lawyer who, through a twist of fate, becomes the head of a crime gang previously run by his brother, and before that, his father. Piotr is a regular family man, but as events unfold proves himself an adept crime boss.
